---
title: A Dynamic Changepoint Model for New Product Sales Forecasting
jupyter: python3
code-links:
  - text: View source
    icon: file-code
    href: https://github.com/abdullahau/customer-analytics/blob/main/notebooks/models/acquisition/dynamic-changepoint-new-product.qmd
---

**Source**: [A Dynamic Changepoint Model for New Product Sales Forecasting](https://www.jstor.org/stable/30036656)

```{python}
import pandas as pd
```
